results.title: I Built AlternateOSS, A Directory of Free, Open-source Alternatives to ...
results.content:
syakirurahman profile image

is APIDog open source?

the suggestion form is in the roadmap for next feature. I still focus on enriching the database first for now

xwiki profile image

Hi, would you care adding XWiki as well?   
We have created the only dedicated Confluence Migrator Toolkit on the market and were also preparing a free webinar this November with a live demo. Here's the registration link for the webinar.

thexdev profile image

Well done, Syakir 🙌

khuongduybui profile image

There's also opensourcealternative.to/

syakirurahman profile image

Yes, its good as well

lukedunsmoto profile image

I've been using your site for a while so this was a fascinating read. Thanks for sharing!

hoaitx profile image [...] syakirurahman profile image

Yes, of course.

Filter is on the roadmap. But for now, you can use search box or go to categories page.

anmolbaranwal profile image
Subscriber

That's exactly what I thought.. OpenAlternative is the most useful one out there.   
Anyway, great work Syakir 🔥

syakirurahman profile image

Thanks Anmol.

Its been a while i didn't hangout here :D

ccbikai profile image

I am glad to see similar competitive products, the page is very smooth.

However, OpenAlternative has been open-sourced. Since you have collected alternatives to open-source software, is your project itself also an open-source alternative?

Also recommend an open-source project of mine sink.cool/, it is an alternative to Bitly.

syakirurahman profile image [...] Sloan, the sloth mascot
syakirurahman profile image

To be honest with you, I found out about view transition API when i visit openAlternative.  
I was a bit demotivated when i found out that there is already similar website, that has really nice UI.

But i keep going on, using it as my product benchmark :D.  
I was thinking, there is no way OpenAlternative will cover all open source tools available on the internet. So, i take my part there lol.

hosseinyazdi profile image

My demotivated? You can even be better and make your platform more updated. Competitions are born this way. Just a quick suggestion though, make sure to add filter options like OpenAlternative, they're vital in a platform as such!

syakirurahman profile image

Yes, of course.

results.title: manishsharmahere/Open-Source-Alternatives
results.content:
Natron: A free, open-source node-based compositing software for visual effects and motion graphics.
 OBS Studio: OBS Studio: Free, open-source software for video recording and live streaming to platforms like Twitch and YouTube, with high-quality encoding.
 OpenShot: A free, open-source, cross-platform video editor offering powerful yet user-friendly editing tools for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
 Pencil2D Animation: An open-source, cross-platform 2D animation software for creating hand-drawn animations with raster and vector workflows.
 Photoflare: A cross-platform, open-source image editor inspired by PhotoFiltre, offering powerful features and superb performance for Linux, Windows, and Mac. [...] Inkscape: A professional vector graphics editor for Linux, macOS and Windows. It's free and open source, ideal for illustrators and designers.
 Kdenlive: A free and open-source non-linear video editor available on Linux, Windows, macOS, and BSD, offering a versatile editing platform.
 Krita: A free and open-source digital painting and illustration software, built for professional artists and creative individuals.
 LiVES: A free, open-source, cross-platform video editing and VJ tool for Linux and UNIX-like systems, offering real-time manipulation and non-linear editing features.
 MyPaint: A free and open-source raster graphics editor designed for digital painting, with a focus on a natural media painting experience. [...] OrientDB: It is a multimodel NoSQL database combining graph and document database capabilities for scalable, high-performance applications.
 PostgreSQL: The world's most advanced open source relational database, known for its reliability, feature robustness, and performance.
 Prisme Analytics: It is a privacy-friendly, open-source web analytics platform offering customizable dashboards and GDPR compliance.
 Redis: A free and open-source, high-performance in-memory data structure store used as a NoSQL key-value database, cache, and message broker.
 RethinkDB: A free and open-source, distributed document database engineered for real-time applications with live push capabilities.

### Cryptocurrency & Blockchain

 0 Finance - Transform idle cash into competitive yield for startups `MIT` `⭐ 236`
 Hey - Decentralized social networking for the Web3 era `GPL-3.0` `⭐ 29K`
 Hummingbot - Open-source crypto trading bot for market making `Apache-2.0` `⭐ 19K`
 OctoBot - Automate crypto trading with open-source strategies `GPL-3.0` `⭐ 6.2K`
 Sigle - Web3 writing platform for content creators and crypto enthusiasts `MIT` `⭐ 488`

### Gaming

 GDevelop - Create 2D and 3D games without coding, powered by AI assistance `⭐ 25K`
 Godot - Free 2D and 3D game engine for cross-platform projects `MIT` `⭐ 114K`
 MonoGame - Free, open-source framework for cross-platform game development `⭐ 14K`
 s&box - Build and play games inside a game engine that runs live `⭐ 6.4K` [...] ### ERP & Operations

 ERPNext - Comprehensive business management, tailored for you `GPL-3.0` `⭐ 37K`
 Ever Gauzy - Comprehensive open-source business management platform `AGPL-3.0` `⭐ 3.8K`

 Odoo - All-in-one business platform covering ERP, CRM, and more `⭐ 53K`
 Open Mercato - AI-native CRM/ERP foundation with 80% already built `MIT` `⭐ 1.5K`
 Shelf - Effortless inventory management for modern businesses `AGPL-3.0` `⭐ 2.7K`

### Finance & Accounting [...] Chaskiq - Open-source customer communication platform `⭐ 3.5K`
 Chatwoot - Omnichannel customer support with a built-in AI assistant `⭐ 34K`
 ClearFlask - Open-source ideation tool for product feedback management `Apache-2.0` `⭐ 443`
 Cossistant - AI-native support infrastructure for modern SaaS `AGPL-3.0` `⭐ 692`
 Fider - Open-source platform for collecting and prioritizing feedback `AGPL-3.0` `⭐ 4.4K`
 Formbricks - Privacy-first survey and experience management platform `⭐ 13K`

 Freescout - Open-source helpdesk for seamless customer support `AGPL-3.0` `⭐ 4.4K`
 LogChimp - Open-source feedback management for product teams `Apache-2.0` `⭐ 1.1K`
